summary: Classified five open PRs from the live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. PRs #75121 and #75126 are quarantined to central security handling because deterministic validation marked them security-sensitive; unrelated non-security PRs remain open with their own proof/review/maintainer gates. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are not planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, and fix PRs.

actions.reason: Keep open as related to the advisor feature tracker. The branch is broad feature work with failed proof, so it is not closable, merge-ready, or eligible for a fix artifact in this job.
Keep open as an independent focused bug-fix PR. It has maintainer/rebase/proof gates, and the job explicitly requires human judgment for focused bug fixes and green-check decisions.
Keep open as related to the cron custom-ID tracker. It is not a duplicate cleanup target, and failed proof/checks block any merge or fixed-by-candidate conclusion.
Route only exact PR #75121 to central OpenClaw security handling. No GitHub mutation or cluster-scoped security action is planned.
Route only exact PR #75126 to central OpenClaw security handling. No GitHub mutation or cluster-scoped security action is planned.
